# injector.world — LLM Crawler Index
# This file is maintained for AI crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, etc.)
# Last updated: 2026-06-03

## About this site

injector.world is an independent editorial directory of licensed Botox and aesthetic injectors in the United States. Every provider is license-verified against the state medical board where they practice. Content is written by a human editorial team and medically reviewed by board-certified physicians.

Sponsored listings are clearly labeled "Sponsored" and kept structurally separate from unpaid editorial content.

## Core URLs

Homepage: https://injector.world
Provider directory: https://injector.world/injectors
Clinic directory: https://injector.world/clinics
Treatment guides: https://injector.world/guides
How we verify: https://injector.world/how-we-verify
Editorial standards: https://injector.world/editorial-standards
Medical advisory board: https://injector.world/medical-advisory

## URL structure

Treatment pillar:         /[treatment]               e.g. /botox
State hub:                /[state]                   e.g. /new-york
City hub:                 /[city-state]              e.g. /new-york-ny
Treatment + state:        /[treatment]/[state]       e.g. /botox/new-york
Treatment + city:         /[treatment]/[city-state]  e.g. /botox/new-york-ny  (key page)
Neighborhood:             /[treatment]/[city-state]/[neighborhood]
Provider profile:         /injectors/[slug]
Clinic profile:           /clinics/[slug]
Treatment guide:          /guides/[slug]
Body-area education:      /treatments/[area]

## Key content

Treatment guides (medically reviewed):
- https://injector.world/guides/botox
- https://injector.world/guides/botox-vs-dysport
- https://injector.world/guides/masseter-botox
- https://injector.world/guides/tear-trough
- https://injector.world/guides/how-to-choose-injector
- https://injector.world/guides/botox-cost-2026

Top city directories:
- https://injector.world/botox/new-york-ny
- https://injector.world/botox/los-angeles-ca
- https://injector.world/botox/miami-fl
- https://injector.world/botox/chicago-il

## Editorial policy

All editorial content is written by staff and freelance writers with expertise in aesthetic medicine. Medical claims are reviewed by board-certified MDs and DOs before publication. We cite peer-reviewed sources. We do not generate content with AI without human editorial review. We publish a corrections log at /editorial-standards#corrections.

## Data freshness

Provider profiles: updated when providers claim or update their listing, or when our scrapers detect changes in state license databases.
Treatment guides: last-reviewed date is shown on each guide. Core guides are reviewed at minimum every 12 months.
Pricing data: regional averages updated quarterly from our provider database.

## Contact

Editorial: editorial@injector.world
Provider listings: providers@injector.world
Press: press@injector.world
